message:
refactor(durability,fusion,index,ops): simplify FSVI verify, improve WAL recovery, fix blend scoring

Multiple targeted improvements across the search engine subsystems:

- Remove xxh3 fast-path from FSVI verify(), relying solely on CRC32
  sidecar verification for simpler, consistent integrity checking
- Simplify watcher test MutexGuard handling to avoid holding lock across
  assertions
- Improve blend scoring with non-finite score fallback handling
- Fix HNSW search parameter passing and distance metric consistency
- Improve WAL recovery with better error handling and entry validation
- Extend OpsStorage resource sample and search metrics with additional
  query-level telemetry fields
- Add frankensearch-index lib.rs export cleanups and repro_bug fixes
- Minor rustfmt and clippy fixes across multiple files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
